task_completion.description: Strategy Analyzer is opened and SampleMACrossover is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Strategy Analyzer window in NinjaTrader with 'SampleMACrossover' selected in the Strategy dropdown or settings pane.

task_completion.description: MSFT is selected as the instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'MSFT' selected in the Instrument dropdown of the Strategy Analyzer settings.

task_completion.description: Date range is set to the full year of 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Start Date set to 1/1/2024 and End Date set to 12/31/2024 in the Strategy Analyzer settings.

task_completion.description: The backtest is executed and the Executions tab is visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Executions' tab being active in the Strategy Analyzer, displaying a grid of trades with columns like Execution ID, Instrument, Action, Quantity, Price, etc.

task_completion.description: The execution list is exported to msft_executions.csv in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box or export interface with the file name 'msft_executions.csv' and the destination folder set to Documents (C:\Users\Docker\Documents).

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader GUI to run the backtest and export
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that NinjaTrader 8 GUI is used for the backtest and export process, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The Executions tab shows realistic trade data
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the Executions tab shows realistic trade data for MSFT in 2024 (prices around $300-$450), not mocked or empty data.

integrity.description: Agent didn't manually create the CSV file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the CSV file is exported directly from NinjaTrader's grid (e.g., via right-click -> Export), not manually typed or created in a text editor like Notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires backtesting the 'SampleMACrossover' strategy on MSFT using daily data from Jan 1, 2024 to Dec 31, 2024. The results must be exported from the Executions tab to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\msft_executions.csv. The backtest should generate at least 5 execution records. MSFT prices in 2024 should be in the $300-$450 range.
